title: Croma Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Croma Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Croma Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Croma Digital Technologies:
Croma Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Digital Technologies!
